items.name: Rod of the Pact Keeper, +1

passive_effects.summary: +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC while attuned.
Regain one warlock spell slot once per dawn.

items.effect: While holding this rod, you gain a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls and to the saving throw DCs of your warlock spells. Regain one warlock spell slot per dawn.

items.name: Rod of the Pact Keeper, +2

passive_effects.summary: +2 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC while attuned.
Regain one warlock spell slot once per dawn.

items.effect: While holding this rod, you gain a +2 bonus to spell attack rolls and to the saving throw DCs of your warlock spells. Regain one warlock spell slot per dawn.

items.name: Rod of the Pact Keeper, +3

passive_effects.summary: +3 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC while attuned.
Regain one warlock spell slot once per dawn.

items.effect: While holding this rod, you gain a +3 bonus to spell attack rolls and to the saving throw DCs of your warlock spells. Regain one warlock spell slot per dawn.

items.name: Rod of Absorption

passive_effects.summary: Absorb spells targeted at you, converting their level to charges. Use charges to cast spells as if using spell slots.

items.effect: When a spell targets only you, you can use your reaction to absorb the spell into the rod (maximum 50 total levels ever). The absorbed levels become charges you can expend to cast spells as if using spell slots.

items.name: Rod of Lordly Might

granted_spells.name: Fear
granted_spells.description: Expend 1 charge to cast fear (save DC 17).

granted_spells.name: Hold Monster
granted_spells.description: Expend 1 charge to cast hold monster (WIS save DC 17) on a creature you hit.

items.effect: A +3 mace that can transform into various weapons. Has 6 charges. Can cast fear (1 charge) or hold monster (1 charge, DC 17) on a creature you hit. Charges reset at dawn.

items.name: Immovable Rod

granted_actions.name: Fix in Place
granted_actions.description: Press the button to fix the rod in space. Immovable until the button is pressed again. Holds 8,000 lb.

items.effect: Press the button to fix the rod in space. An immovable object — holds up to 8,000 lb. DC 30 STR check to move it.
